best_practice: Treat classic SEO as the foundation for AI Overviews, AI Mode, Bing Copilot and grounding results.
why_latest_or_relevant: Google and Bing both state AI search experiences depend on normal crawling, indexing, ranking, retrieval and content quality.
leatt_action: Keep product/category pages indexable, useful, specific and technically clean; avoid creating a separate 'AI SEO' silo.
what_it_signals: Organic visibility, AI visibility, cited/grounded answer eligibility.
reporting_kpis: Search Console, Bing Webmaster Tools, Merchant Center AI performance insights.

best_practice: Implement complete Product/ProductGroup JSON-LD for PDPs and variants.
why_latest_or_relevant: Product schema helps search systems understand price, availability, identifiers, variants, shipping and returns.
leatt_action: Add SKU/GTIN where available, price, availability, images, brand, variants, ratings, shipping and return policy.
what_it_signals: Rich result eligibility, shopping panel coverage, product understanding.
reporting_kpis: Structured data validation, rich result eligibility, product data completeness.

best_practice: Use Merchant Center feeds as the trusted product-data layer, not only on-page schema.
why_latest_or_relevant: Google says using both structured data and Merchant Center feeds maximizes eligibility and helps verify product data.
leatt_action: Create/enrich feed attributes for title, description, category, image, price, availability, shipping, returns, GTIN/SKU and product highlights.
what_it_signals: Free listings, shopping surfaces, AI shopping visibility, feed approval health.
reporting_kpis: Feed disapprovals, product completeness, free listing impressions, AI share of voice where available.

best_practice: Rewrite product/category copy around shopper questions and use-cases, not keyword stuffing.
why_latest_or_relevant: AI shopping queries are more conversational and journey-based; Merchant Center AI insights measure query terms and journey phases.
leatt_action: For Apparel, add buying-guide language such as use-case, fit, protection level, terrain, climate, rider type and compatibility.
what_it_signals: AI query coverage, non-brand demand capture, PDP conversion.
reporting_kpis: Conversational query coverage, FAQ engagement, Search Console long-query clicks.

best_practice: Build authoritative category hubs for hero and high-margin categories.
why_latest_or_relevant: Ecommerce navigation and internal links help search engines understand site structure and page importance.
leatt_action: Create a Apparel hub because it contributes R1,759,430,045 modeled revenue; link to subcategories, guides and PDPs.
what_it_signals: Category rankings, internal PageRank flow, crawl discovery, conversion paths.
reporting_kpis: Non-brand category clicks, impressions, indexed category URLs, category revenue.

best_practice: Control filter/facet URLs so useful facets are indexable and low-value combinations do not waste crawl budget.
why_latest_or_relevant: Large ecommerce catalogs can generate duplicate/thin URLs; canonical, noindex and sitemap decisions must be deliberate.
leatt_action: Index SEO-worthy combinations like activity/category; noindex or canonical low-value filters like sort, price-only or temporary parameters.
what_it_signals: Crawl efficiency, duplicate control, category authority.
reporting_kpis: Indexed URL count, duplicate title rate, crawl waste, canonical mismatch.

best_practice: Prefer server-side rendering, static rendering or hydration for product/category content.
why_latest_or_relevant: Google guidance says dynamic rendering is a workaround, not a long-term solution.
leatt_action: Ensure product names, prices, images, links, availability and category copy are visible in rendered HTML and linked via href anchors.
reporting_kpis: Rendered HTML checks, Search Console URL inspection, crawl comparison.

best_practice: Use human-reviewed AI assistance; do not publish scaled auto-generated copy without expertise or value.
why_latest_or_relevant: Bing warns against automatically generated low-quality content, keyword stuffing, scraped content and prompt-injection manipulation.
leatt_action: Use AI to draft briefs, then add expert product knowledge, unique comparisons, fit notes, local shipping/returns and real customer language.
what_it_signals: Trust, ranking resilience, AI citation quality.
reporting_kpis: Content QA score, duplicate content, organic assisted conversion, review sentiment.

best_practice: Keep structured data consistent with visible page content.
why_latest_or_relevant: Bing and Google can ignore misleading or invalid markup; structured data must represent what users see.
leatt_action: Validate schema in CI; block deployment when price, availability or return policy markup differs from PDP content/feed.
what_it_signals: Rich result trust, data consistency, reduced eligibility loss.
reporting_kpis: Schema errors, merchant feed mismatches, PDP/feed price deltas.

best_practice: Create a new AI Search Visibility report, separate from normal SEO but connected to revenue.
why_latest_or_relevant: Merchant Center AI performance insights introduces share of voice, competitor average, query frequency and journey phase metrics where available.
leatt_action: Track discovery/evaluation/purchase query visibility, product terms, competitor presence and content gaps.
what_it_signals: AI share of voice, emerging demand, competitor displacement.
reporting_kpis: AI impressions, share of voice, query type, journey phase, competitor average.

best_practice: Submit clean sitemaps and use IndexNow for freshness where appropriate.
why_latest_or_relevant: Bing guidelines emphasize sitemaps, freshness, crawlable links and structured data for search and AI grounding.
leatt_action: Publish canonical sitemap URLs with accurate lastmod; submit important product/category updates via IndexNow.
reporting_kpis: Bing indexed pages, crawl errors, IndexNow submissions, sitemap lastmod accuracy.

best_practice: Connect SEO, Merchant Center, GA4, Shopify, Fabric and Power BI into one growth model.
why_latest_or_relevant: SEO becomes more valuable when traffic, ranking, product data, returns and margin are evaluated together.
leatt_action: Join query/category/product data to revenue, margin, returns and stock so SEO recommendations optimize profit, not only clicks.
what_it_signals: Profitable organic growth and reduced wasted content effort.
reporting_kpis: Organic revenue, gross margin, return rate by landing page, stockout impact.
